creator: victor@bsdes.net
text:
Hello Remko,

That servers still run FreeBSD 7.1 with a few patches. I'm planning
on upgrading them to FreeBSD 8.2 now that's released, but that will
take some time for doing all the tests.

I think you can close this PR now, and if we have any other problem
with re(4) interfaces, we'll just open a new PR.

Thanks a lot.
Regards.

-- 
La prueba más fehaciente de que existe vida inteligente en otros
planetas, es que no han intentado contactar con nosotros.
